title: Tuttas Retextures: Exposure Edition
body:
A resource pack that gives the camera from the [Exposure Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) a new look!!

This retexture is based on the camera model from **Minecraft: Education Edition**, giving it a charming, rugged, and retro aesthetic.

**This Resource Packs includes these changes:**
- Complete redesign of the camera from the Exposure mod.
- Retextures for most of the related items (all films, all photographs, all albums, the camera stand & camera Items).
- Album and Camera Attachments GUI Retextures.
- Full compatibility with the Polaroid addon.

I'm very happy with the result, and I hope you enjoy playing with this as much as I do! jiijijiiji
